_comment: D5 fixture for /demos/agent-config. The agent reads tone/expertise/responseLength from CopilotKit provider properties and builds its system prompt per turn. The D5 script verifies that a chat round-trip works (agent picks up the config and answers); the canned response here is generic but mentions 'tone' so the assertion can substring-check that the agent received and acknowledged the config keys. Substring 'introduce yourself per your config' is unique.

response.content: Hello — I'm operating with the configured tone, expertise, and responseLength forwarded by the CopilotKit provider. Adjust the controls above the chat and my system prompt will rebuild on the next turn.
